script:
echo '===== LAST 5 INBOUND ACTIVITIES (sender + actionable check) =====' && python3 -c "
import json
import sys
import os
F='/home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/activities.jsonl'
USER_AAD='f22f3f54-9d79-425e-9f86-69bab6a3d728'
YOO_AAD='e0d48eb4-1eb3-4263-a72e-f6ad4ef32238'
lines = open(F).readlines()
print(f'Total entries: {len(lines)}')
for l in lines[-5:]:
    try:
        env = json.loads(l)
        b = json.loads(env.get('body','{}'))
        ts = env.get('ts','?')
        kind = b.get('type','?')
        frm = b.get('from') or {}
        from_name = frm.get('name','?')
        from_aad = frm.get('aadObjectId','')
        from_id = frm.get('id','')
        text = (b.get('text','') or '')[:80]
        conv_type = (b.get('conversation') or {}).get('conversationType','')
        actionable = '✓' if (kind=='message' and from_aad in (USER_AAD, YOO_AAD) and (b.get('text','') or '').strip()) else '✗'
        who = 'AIXA' if from_aad==USER_AAD else 'YOO' if from_aad==YOO_AAD else f'OTHER ({from_aad[:8]}…)'
        print(f'  {ts} type={kind:>10} actionable={actionable} from={who:<25} name={from_name!r}')
        print(f'    text: {text!r}')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'  parse error: {e}')
"
echo && echo '===== OUTBOUND LOG (replies bot sent) =====' && O=/home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/outbound.jsonl && if [ -f $O ]; then echo "Total replies sent: $(wc -l < $O)"; tail -3 $O | jq -r '"  ts=" + .ts + " chat=" + (.chat_id // "?") + " text_preview=" + ((.text // "")[:80] | tostring)' 2>&1 | head -10; else echo '  (no outbound.jsonl — bot has never sent a reply)'; fi && echo && echo '===== ERRORS LOG (current contents) =====' && cat /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10 && echo && echo '===== LAST RUN_CLAUDE OUTPUT (debug log tail) =====' && tail -30 /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null && echo && echo '===== JOURNAL LAST 30 MIN (app lines only) =====' && journalctl -u aixa-responder.service -u aixa-bot.service --since '30 minutes ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'systemd\[1\]' | tail -30
